title: coleus sessilifolius
intro: Coleus sessilifolius, also known as 'Golden Coin' or 'Mexican Coleus', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coleus sessilifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
